manus_instruction: REVIEW_ONLY — do not send email or SMS until operations sign-off

queue.personalized_message_body:
Dear Michelle Carter,

I am reaching out from VettedCare.ai regarding skilled nursing staffing support for Adelphi Nursing and Rehabilitation Center in Prince George's County.

Maryland operators are carrying more census volatility and agency spend than ever — and credential risk on the floor is no longer a back-office problem. VettedCare.ai deploys a Maryland-specific GNA compliance firewall: every CNA is run through automated MBON verification and active GNA endorsement checks before they enter your staffing queue.

For Adelphi, that means fewer surprise send-backs, cleaner survey posture, and lookahead shift matching that surfaces only compliance-cleared clinicians for your SNF environment.

If staffing pressure is building on your nursing leadership team, I would welcome a brief conversation to outline a same-week coverage plan tailored to your operation.

Respectfully,
VettedCare.ai Staffing Desk
Staging outreach — not for live dispatch

Dear Patricia Nguyen,

VettedCare.ai partners with Director of Nursing leaders across Montgomery County to place MBON-cleared CNA, GNA, and LPN coverage without the credential friction that disrupts patient care.

Our Maryland-specific GNA compliance firewall ensures that no CNA appears in your Arbor Ridge at Riderwood staffing pipeline without verified GNA endorsement and active Maryland Board of Nursing status. That structural gate reduces floor-level risk and protects your team from last-minute agency replacements driven by compliance gaps.

We combine county-aware clinician routing with lookahead matching so your DON desk sees only vetted profiles — not a flood of unverified resumes.

I would appreciate 15 minutes to walk through how this model can relieve staffing strain at Arbor Ridge this quarter.

Respectfully,
VettedCare.ai Staffing Desk
Staging outreach — not for live dispatch
